programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo se encuentra con Pedro, ambos se asombran. Atropellan a Leonardo y se llevan a Pedro a la fuerza. Leonardo despierta en el hospital y no sabe quién es. Pedro no sabe qué hace en la casa de Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro dice que él no es Leonardo, pero no le creen. En el mercado todos le dan la bienvenida a Leonardo creyendo que es Pedro. Ignacio y Fernanda son amantes. Paloma anima a Leonardo y él le dice que ella lo hace sentir bien.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le pide disculpas a Fernanda. Leonardo conoce a su nueva psicóloga. Pedro llama a su abuela, así se entera de que Leonardo está en su casa. Pedro se disfraza para ver a su familia y ve cuando Leonardo besa a Paloma.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro se pone celoso al ver a Leonardo con Paloma, decide seguir viviendo la vida de su clon. Fernanda vista a su hermano en la cárcel, mientras Yesenia visita a su padre, el Chamoy. Pedro logra entrar a la computadora de Leonardo.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Alejandra Aguirre se aterra porque su hijo entra en la casa de unos poderosos hacendados. Atormentada por su secreto corre a buscarlo, allí conoce a Ángel, el hijo de Leonardo Cisneros.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Presionado por Flavia, Leonardo busca a Alejandra para que se mude de la región, Valentín lo recibe y actúa con violencia. Ella rechaza su propuesta y lo desprecia, él la ama y le pide perdón.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Leonardo vive atormentado con sus recuerdos, mientras Alejandra vuelve al pueblo y ve a Ángel, quien le demuestra su interés. Él le pide a su padre que le diga todo lo que sabe de los Aguirre.

programme.title: Madre Luna
programme.desc: Leonardo no deja de pensar en Alejandra y se siente más abrumado con las preguntas de Ángel sobre ella. Él no contesta sus interrogantes y le pide que se aleje de la gente de los Pajonales.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños rituales de asesinato conducen al equipo en busca del asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al sur para investigar a un veloz asesino cuya firma coincide con la de un asesino en serie de hace 30 años. Además, el equipo descubre que alguien los sigue e imita los crímenes que ya han resuelto.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Reid descubre que su novia fue secuestrada por su acosador, él y el equipo de la UAC se reúnen para encontrarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Farsa
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra en una carrera contrarreloj cuando un grupo terrorista amenaza con detonar una bomba radioactiva en la zona de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Quien se aleja
programme.desc: Cuando la inmunidad diplomática complica un caso de abuso infantil para Danny y Baez, Frank interviene, a pesar de no tener jurisdicción en el caso.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Dentro y fuera
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un líder de pandilla, Danny y Baez descubren que el presunto asesino es un ex convicto que tiene una relación romántica con su oficial de libertad condicional, quien podría estar ayudando a encubrir el crimen.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Almas perdidas
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un conductor ebrio que mató a una madre y su hijo, Danny y Baez se debaten entre cumplir con su deber y buscar justicia al descubrir la conexión entre el sospechoso y la víctima.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Apuesta alta
programme.desc: Cuando el hermano de Linda, Jimmy (Kevin Dillon), se mete en problemas con la mafia, le suplica a Danny que lo ayude a mantenerse a salvo hasta que la situación se calme

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: The road calls and Kerry considers taking a gig on a tour that conflicts with his wedding anniversary. When Rachyl informs Kerry that she is seriously considering law schools in other states, Kerry puts his foot down.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson tries to take things slow with Jessica until unexpected temptations drive him back to his old ways. When Rachyl receives a text from an ex, her past threatens to derail her present. Alexandra competes in the Miss Tennessee USA Pageant.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson has to decide if he's ready for a serious relationship with Jessica, or if pageant girl Savana is more his speed. Rachyl struggles to tell Kerry about a recent text exchange with an Ex who just moved back to Nashville.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson might be biting off more than he can chew when he decides to perform live, and Kerry progresses his music career when he connects with another singer.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: After Kerry comes home late after a night out with Brooke, Rachyl grapples with the state of their relationship. Jackson practices with Jessica for his upcoming birthday performance, but Savana becomes suspicious of how much time they spend together.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: On the season finale, Rachyl and Kerry make a big decision about their future, and Jackson comes to a realization about Jessica (and his music) after Savana's ultimatum.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The trip to Miami gets off to a great start until the sun goes down and shots get poured. When Mattie goes missing, Don "Daddy" Johnson is on the case. Back at the house, Lyle makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle's girlfriend, Santana, comes to visit but little does she know her life is going to change forever. All of the roommates come together to plan the most perfect marriage proposal for Lyle.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Lyle gets an answer for his proposal and the gang throws Mattie an 80s skating birthday party. Tiffany learns some troubling news about Hannah's boyfriend, Cody. Martha redecorates the boys' bedroom.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: It's the last weekend in St. Pete and the roommates want to go out with a bang. Single Lauren hits the town, Murray catches a shark, Walt brings home an animal lover and Hannah confronts Cody about his infidelity.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The cast gets together to rehash their latest vacation in St. Petersburg, Florida… the good, the bad, and the hurricanes.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: The crew arrives at their beautiful new vacation house in Savannah, Georgia. Lauren and Tiffany struggle to keep an explosive secret from Lyle, while Murray and Hannah must console Mattie… after Daddy calls her Martha.

programme.title: Party Down South
programme.desc: Tiffany and Lauren tell Lyle devastating news about his fiancée, Santana. In an attempt to woo a woman into bed, Walt plays some sweet, out-of-tune tunes on his guitar. Daddy brings the wrong girl home from the bar.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: There's a wedding going on at Chris and Aimee's and you are not going to believe who's it is! Doug and Wendy are newly separated, and Jared has a new money making venture.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared hatches another "get rich quick" scheme. Doug finds out Wendy has moved on... with lawn care. And Aimee forces Chris to bond with his new son-in-law.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Aimee hosts a Mexican themed fiesta for Mason's friend to prove the family isn't racist, Doug goes speed dating, and Christian drops a bomb on the family.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared enjoys some new, expensive toys, the girls take Wendy out for a night on the town, and Doug takes care of the kids for the weekend.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared throws a fundraiser for his sick friend Cooda. Doug volunteers himself for a bachelor auction, and Mason gets wrongfully grounded.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug takes the guys to the Super Bowl of single life: Spring Break! They convince the girls they're headed to a vineyard, but after a few drinks, their lies start to unravel.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug crashes at Tommy and Tammy's and shares a bunk bed with Hunter. Chris goes overboard at a storage auction, and Jared tries to make the next big internet video.

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee try to spice up their love life. Jared opens a Haunted Frog Gigging Tour, and Wendy goes on a date!

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Doug and Wendy co-host a birthday party for Presley. Chris puts Mason through a boot camp, and Jared wins a timeshare!

programme.title: My Big Redneck Family
programme.desc: Jared's dream vacation turns into a nightmare when the family first gets to the Bahamas and sees a side of the island far different than the brochures.

programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.desc: Aired 7/10/2016. The FBI and Defense Intelligence Agency join forces to catch Ana Montes, a senior DIA analyst who was passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers capture a suspected burglar, a felon, and his girlfriend are taken into custody after a standoff with police, and a man is arrested for possession of a stolen moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic accident where a man ran his truck through a wall. An undercover officer poses as a “john” hoping to attract unsuspecting prostitutes. A vehicle is stopped due to a missing license plate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes several units on a reckless journey on the wrong side of the highway. Officers sets up a reverse sting operation designed to capture a suspected drug dealer. Officers decide to pull over a driver who intentionally avoided a road block.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in a stolen vehicle sends officers on a high-speed chase, deputies confront a driver asleep at the wheel, and a trespassing call becomes a neighborhood-wide ordeal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver and his wife in a high-speed chase, a paranoid man vandalizes his roommate's car, and a shoplifter can't keep her story straight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vigilant neighbor calls the police when he sees a man robbing a liquor store, and a driver refuses to pull over while driving his new friend's truck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract interested “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer decides to check out a local bar where a lot of illegal activity takes place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods. Grissom, Sarah, and Greg try to determine how a man was killed in a hotel room. It leads them to a convention of big women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car showgirl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: The guys of Cheers try to lift Carla's spirits when she places a personal ad.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm hires a private investigator to find out if Vera is having an affair.

programme.title: La vida de Chucho el Roto (LAS)
programme.desc: La vida del legendario Chucho el Roto que robaba a los ricos para dar a los pobres.

programme.title: Yo soy Chucho el Roto (LAS)
programme.desc: El carpintero Jesús Arriaga se enamora de Erica Matilde, pero los tíos de ella se oponen a la relación y lo arrestan por robo. Se fuga de la cárcel y se convierte en un bandido generoso.

programme.title: Fuerza 10 de Navarone
programme.desc: Durante los días más oscuros de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, los ejércitos de Hitler están asaltando a través de Europa, aniquilando toda oposición a su paso.

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!
programme.desc: Un desenlace explosivo aguarda a un terrorista irlandés (James Coburn) obsesionado con la dinamita que se alía con un campesino mexicano convertido en revolucionario (Rod Steiger) en este trepidante relato de poder y política.

programme.title: Mississippi en llamas
programme.desc: Dos agentes del FBI de aspecto muy diferente llegan a Mississippi para investigar la desaparición de algunos defensores de los derechos civiles.

programme.title: Entrega mortal
programme.desc: Un sargento del ejército tiene la misión de llevar a un prisionero desde Berlín a Washington. Cuando este último escapa, el sargento se ve envuelto en medio de una conspiración para deshacerse de él.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: “Amistad” es la historia de un motín en 1839 a bordo de un barco de esclavos que viaja a la costa noroeste de Estados Unidos. Gran parte de la historia tiene que ver con un drama judicial sobre el esclavo que lideró la rebelión.

programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Cuando los hermanos se encuentran
programme.desc: Tom Cruise interpreta a un comerciante de ruedas egocéntrico que descubre que tiene un hermano autista (Dustin Hoffman) y lo lleva a un viaje inolvidable por todo el país en esta histérica, profunda y conmovedora ganadora del Oscar® a la Mejor Película.

programme.title: Días de trueno
programme.desc: Tim Daland descubre a Cole y lo pone en el equipo liderado por el legendario Harry Hogge para ir por la Copa NASCAR en el Daytona 500. Un choque casi acaba con la carrera de Cole y debe recurrir a una hermosa doctora para recuperar el valor.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Fuimos héroes
programme.desc: En 1965, Estados Unidos está en guerra con Vietnam del Norte, y el teniente coronel Hal Moore prepara a sus tropas para una de las batallas más violentas de la historia de EE. UU.: “El valle de la muerte”.

programme.title: Por un puñado de besos
programme.desc: Una chica, un chico en una historia de amor, pero también sobre los sueños, los miedos, la vida, el amor verdadero, la amistad, la forma en que lo afrontamos y un secreto entre los dos…

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: About Adam
programme.desc: Cuando la despreocupada Lucy (Kate Hudson) al fin conoce a su hombre perfecto, Adam (Stuart Townsend), está lista para sentar cabeza de verdad. Pero mientras Lucy está ocupada planeando la boda, Adam está ocupado ¡encantando al resto de su familia!

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Enemigo al acecho
programme.desc: Dos francotiradores, uno ruso y uno alemán, juegan al gato y el ratón durante la Batalla de Stalingrado.

programme.title: La sombra de los culpables
programme.desc: Dos policías corruptos asesinan a un agente secreto de la DEA por error, e intentan frenéticamente borrar sus rastros incriminando a un vagabundo. Eso implica falsificar evidencias, entrenar testigos, e improvisar para que no se descubra su plan.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: EL campeón de kickboxing Eric Sloane es paralizado en el ring por el malvado Tong Po. El hermano menor de Eric, Kurt, busca venganza. Kurt aprende Muay-Thai del gurú de la pelea Xian Chow.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: Dos duros sobre ruedas
programme.desc: Mickey Rourke y Don Johnson protagonizan esta colisión de géneros de cuatro caminos: película de moteros, thriller de atracos, película de amigos y película de ciencia ficción, que te hará sentir una aventura y acción trepidantes.

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: Son de mar
programme.desc: Ulises llega a una ciudad como profesor. Conoce a Martina, se casan, tienen un hijo y un día desaparece.

programme.title: Mientras Duermes
programme.desc: Un portero trastornado que tiene la manía de atormentar a sus residentes decide intimidar a la vecina más alegre y arruinarle la vida a toda costa.

programme.title: Todo incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: Cuando era niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo lo que muchos otros murieron tratando de hacer. Mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino en masa que aterrorizó a los residentes de Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinatos.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan
programme.desc: La Gran Manzana está en grandes problemas, ya que el indestructible psicópata Jason Voorhees sale a la ciudad de Nueva York y pinta la ciudad de "rojo".

programme.title: Always and Forever

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: Event Horizon: La nave de la muerte
programme.desc: En 2047, un equipo de astronautas se embarca en una misión para recuperar una nave espacial. Sin embargo, esta simple tarea los conducirá a algo mucho más aterrador de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: Caso 39

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: South Park: Más grande, más larga y sin censura
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny y Cartman ven una película prohibida para menores que les deforma sus frágiles cabezas. Sus padres no tardan en declarar la guerra a Canadá y los chicos son la última esperanza que tiene Estados Unidos para frenar el Armagedón.

programme.title: Los Coneheads
programme.desc: Con una mirada sabrás que son de un lugar muy extraño. Son Coneheads.

programme.title: Héroes fuera de órbita
programme.desc: Casi veinte años después de que se canceló el programa de televisión de culto Galaxy Quest, una especie alienígena pide ayuda al elenco para salvar al universo.

programme.title: Duro de vender (el que no enseña no vende)

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.desc: Billie Jo enters a picture of the family dog in a pet-food company's contest, and the mutt is selected one of five finalists.

programme.desc: A potential candidate for governor employs Interect to probe his background. He believes that if the detective agency can't find dirt on him, then his political opponents won't.

programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how earthquakes and faults have shaped human history by bringing both life and death.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how rocks have influenced the architecture of the Mediterranean, from the pyramids of Egypt to the squares of ancient Greece.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: Deep inside the citadel, the Doctor discovers the legendary Xeraphin who were believed to have been wiped out long ago. They have survived the radiation on Earth by merging themselves into one entity with incredible psychic powers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Time-Flight
programme.desc: The Doctor must try and return the Concorde passengers back to their own time, but his TARDIS is missing vital components. Will he be able to stop the Master before it's too late? Meanwhile, Tegan is facing a difficult decision about her future.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: Caught in a warp ellipse, the TARDIS is drawn to a huge spacecraft orbiting Earth whereupon the Doctor is separated in space and time from Nyssa and Tegan.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Mawdryn Undead
programme.desc: At Brendon School, the Doctor enlists the help of the Brigadier. At Brendon School, Tegan enlists the help of the Brigadier. Same man, different time periods, however.

programme.title: Norteados con Don Cheto
programme.desc: EstrellaTV es el canal líder en español de noticias y entretenimiento con una gran variedad de programación que abarca noticias y juegos, realities, competencias de talento y “talk shows”. ¡Una experiencia que no se pueden perder!

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron
programme.desc: Dos familias competirán respondiendo a distintas preguntas por la oportunidad de ganar dinero basados en las respuestas más populares, de acuerdo a las previamente respondidas por 100 latinos alrededor de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Retofamosos
programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: A que no puedes
programme.desc: Emocionante juego que enfrenta a dos equipos de celebridades en su intento por realizar pruebas y retos únicos. El equipo que complete con éxito la tarea, ganará dinero para una obra de ayuda social.

programme.title: 100 latinos dijeron

programme.desc: Celebridades ayudan a los participantes a hacer sus sueños realidad. Durante cada episodio la pareja con más puntos obtiene la oportunidad de escoger cual sueño se hará realidad.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, a high school girl vanished after attending a party. The prime suspect had two alibi witnesses for the night she disappeared. A solid alibi can often overcome circumstantial evidence, but forensic evidence is another matter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.desc: Shirley starts seeing an older rich gentleman. His snobby family thinks that she only wants his money and couldn't possibly like him for any other reason. Will they let her prove she's not a 'gold digger' or simply stand on their assumptions?

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro uses the Realm Crystal to open a portal to the Cursed Realm, ghosts take over the town - but the Ninja, in disguise, manage to get Lloyd to the center of the town and Lloyd steals the crystal…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Determined to give the Insomniac's a night of good dreams, Izzie and friends bring them to the Candy Realm; but nowhere is safe from Nightmare King.

programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic ... and extra dangerous!

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Sally destroys Nick's model of a mountain, the Cat takes them to meet Sara of Serendip, an inventor who helps them understand that you can make new discoveries through your mistakes.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln's social standing is at stake when his four-year-old sister is put into his fifth grade class; the children grow tired of their family van falling apart, so they decide to try to trick Dad into buying a cool, new van.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lola and Lana try out for Bluebell Scouts, but discover one of them might be more suited for it; when Lincoln and Clyde think Bobby is cheating on Lori, they follow him around town gathering evidence.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia Loud cree que está a salvo de las bromas del Día de los Inocentes porque el bromista Luan se encuentra de campamento; cuando los niños descubren que su padre ya no está en el trabajo antiguo, creen que puede ser su culpa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos

programme.title: Una casa de locos

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Legally Blonde

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Legendary children Kady Z, Jillian Hervey and Kelly Osbourne join the queens to form All Star girl groups in a battle of the divas for the fiercest set. Rosie Perez and Mary Wilson of the Supremes guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The final four assume super hero and super foe alter egos and go to epic heights to vanquish their nemesis. RuPaul is joined by guest judges actress/comedian Wendi McClendon – Covey and Mistress of the Dark Elvira.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: For the final challenge, RuPaul sends her All Stars on a junket that culminates with a stand-up routine at L.A.'s Comedy Store. Cheri Oteri is their comedy coach and is joined on the judge's panel by The Gossip's Beth Ditto.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: In a fight to the death, Vlad The Impaler, the butcher of Transylvania whose blood-thirsty deeds inspired the legend of Dracula, faces off with Sun TZU, the Chinese warmonger who wrote the Art of War, which led to the slaughter of millions.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Two of America's most successful criminal masterminds and their brutal gangs go head to head. Jesse James' Gang of gun-slinging, sharp-shooting bank robbers battle Al Capone's Gang of notorious, bullet-spewing Tommy Gun mobsters.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As Vancouver Island is pummeled by torrential rains, the remaining teams scramble to avoid freezing floodwaters. One team attempts a massive construction project that could be their key to survival.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The three remaining teams scramble for long-term advantage. One pair runs themselves ragged with an elaborate shelter build, while another faces hazards from the freezing Pacific waters on their own small craft.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must create signature slasher blades, each using a different type of metal to contend with. After two grueling rounds, the two finalists return to their home forges to recreate the Grim Reaper's scythe.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths return to the Middle Ages when they are tasked with forging a Crusader's Dagger from a thick rod of W1 steel. Issues abound as the competitors battle problems with their heat treat and blade warping.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In one of the toughest competitions to date, four bladesmiths must start from the ground up, building their own coal forges using materials scavenged from a storage unit.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the FBI uncover a possible terrorist attack on Los Angeles that targets the city's water supply.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When thieves hijack a truck filled with valuable medical supplies, $50 million dollars intended for a relief effort in Zambia, and two aid workers, the FBI races a second violent crew intent on getting to the goods first.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: In the wake of a deadly standoff with a mysterious, yet, brilliant bomber, Don and Charlie discover that he was poisoned to keep him from exposing a shocking secret that will change the FBI team forever.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Breck Mulligan, a wealthy young man who disappeared from the shelter for indigent women where he'd volunteered as part of his sentence for drug possession.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team work on the case of a young ice dancer, Kelly McMurphy (KATIJA PEVEC), who has disappeared.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As the team members search for a widower and his two teenaged kids, they attempt to determine who's responsible for the gunfire that left the missing family's living room splattered with blood.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a white girl and a black boy coincidentally vanish on the same night, Jack attempts to counteract Vivian's prediction that the media and FBI will focus more on the white girl's case.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a former assistant district attorney, Jack talks to her boyfriend, Alan Davis (JASON PRIESTLEY).

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In the fifth season premiere, the team searches for a missing 5-year-old boy, Todd, and his father, Randall, after being tipped off by Todd's 12-year-old brother, Bryan.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Elena goes undercover as an exotic dancer at a club where a missing stripper, Cindy Peterson, worked, while Danny poses as one of her customers.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a missing 911 operator, Jessica Lawson, who was accosted by a man whose wife died while he was seeking Jessica's help on a 911 line.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a 15-year-old prisoner, Malia Norton (HALLEE HIRSH), who disappeared from a girls' detention center after receiving a life-threatening note.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack becomes fixated on using the desperate situation of Sadik Marku, the Albanian mob boss who had an ominous role in one of the team's previous cases, to unearth evidence against him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team must track down two assailants who wear animal masks while committing armed robberies, with the latest leaving an off-duty 26 Fed security guard dead.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Showdown at the Grand
programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.title: Two for the Money
programme.desc: After suffering a career-ending knee injury, a former college football star aligns himself with one of the most renowned touts in the sports-gambling business.

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Coneheads
programme.desc: One look and you know they're from a very strange place. They're from New Jersey, by way of “France,” by way of far- off, far -out Remulak. They're Coneheads.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: Tromaville has a monstrous new hero. The Toxic Avenger is born when meek mop boy Melvin falls into a vat of toxic waste. Now evildoers will have a lot to lose.

programme.title: Frankenhooker
programme.desc: A medical student sets out to recreate his decapitated fiancée by building her a new body made of Manhattan street prostitutes.

programme.title: Solarbabies
programme.desc: This futuristic tale features the top talents of Hollywood's new generation including Jami Gertz, Lukas Haas and Jason Patric as prisoners in a fortress who plan their dazzling escape on wheels.

programme.title: Mac and Me
programme.desc: A young boy confined to a wheelchair finds a lost alien creature and helps him return to his home and learn many magical things in the process.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing

programme.title: A Chance Encounter
programme.desc: In a Sicilian town an aspiring poet in search of inspiration meets a folk singer.

programme.title: Filly Brown
programme.desc: A promising hip-hop rhymer from Los Angeles finds herself in a gray area when a record producer offers her a compromising shot at stardom.

programme.title: August: Osage County
programme.desc: Meryl Streep and Julia Roberts lead an all-star cast. A family crisis unites a dispersed group of siblings at the Oklahoma house they grew up in with the dysfunctional woman who raised them.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Bleed For This
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of world champion boxer Vinny "The Pazmanian Devil" Pazienza, who-after a near fatal car crash-made one of sport's most incredible comebacks.

programme.title: Raging Bull
programme.desc: RAGING BULL is director Martin Scorsese's lacerating film biography of middleweight boxing champion Jake LaMotta, who was known during his brief reign as "the Bronx Bull."

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: To his family and friends, Cody Banks is a typical teen. But Cody has a secret - he's actually part of an undercover teen CIA program and has 5 years of special training under his belt.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch-rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.desc: Teenager Max McGrath is adjusting to a new school when his body starts to generate strange energy flare-ups that he can't control.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
